competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Congo DR. Yoane Wissa is caught offside.
Ngal'ayel Mukau (Congo DR) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Goal! England 0, Congo DR 1. Brian Cipenga (Congo DR) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Chancel Mbemba.

events.description: 布赖恩·西彭加破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Lionel Mpasi (Congo DR).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Nathanaël Mbuku (Congo DR) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Brian Cipenga (Congo DR).
Corner, England. Conceded by Samuel Moutoussamy.
Foul by Noni Madueke (England).
Foul by Jude Bellingham (England).
Jude Bellingham (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Marcus Rashford (England).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Djed Spence (England) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Noah Sadiki (Congo DR) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt saved. Jude Bellingham (England) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Lionel Mpasi (Congo DR). Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross.

events.description: 贝林厄姆射正。 德克兰·赖斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Brian Cipenga (Congo DR) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Arthur Masuaku.

events.description: 布赖恩·西彭加射门偏出。 亚瑟·马苏库参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nico O'Reilly (England).
Attempt blocked. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Attempt missed. Nico O'Reilly (England) left footed shot from very close range misses to the left. Assisted by Noni Madueke.

events.description: 尼科·奥雷利射门偏出。 诺丽玛杜克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Marcus Rashford (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Nico O'Reilly.

events.description: 马库斯·拉什福德射门被封堵。 尼科·奥雷利参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Noni Madueke (England) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 诺丽玛杜克射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nico O'Reilly (England).
Offside, Congo DR. Aaron Wan-Bissaka is caught offside.
Marcus Rashford (England) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt blocked. Noni Madueke (England) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Jude Bellingham.

events.description: 诺丽玛杜克射门被封堵。 贝林厄姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Nico O'Reilly.

events.description: 刚果民主共和国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ngal'ayel Mukau (Congo DR).
Jude Bellingham (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins England 0, Congo DR 1.
Harry Kane (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Jude Bellingham (England) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Lionel Mpasi (Congo DR). Assisted by Noni Madueke with a cross.

events.description: 贝林厄姆射正。 诺丽玛杜克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Djed Spence (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, England. Conceded by Ngal'ayel Mukau.
Corner, England. Conceded by Arthur Masuaku.
Offside, Congo DR. Brian Cipenga is caught offside.
Elliot Anderson (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, England. Conceded by Nathanaël Mbuku.
Attempt missed. Marcus Rashford (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Jude Bellingham following a fast break.

events.description: 马库斯·拉什福德射门偏出。 贝林厄姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the bottom right corner by Lionel Mpasi (Congo DR). Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross.

events.description: 凯恩射正。 德克兰·赖斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Marcus Rashford (England) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Noni Madueke with a cross.

events.description: 马库斯·拉什福德射门偏出。 诺丽玛杜克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Congo DR. Ngal'ayel Mukau is caught offside.
Substitution, England. Bukayo Saka replaces Noni Madueke.

events.description: 萨卡替补登场，换下诺丽玛杜克。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, England. Anthony Gordon replaces Marcus Rashford.

events.description: 安东尼·哥顿替补登场，换下马库斯·拉什福德。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Brian Cipenga (Congo DR) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Noah Sadiki.

events.description: 布赖恩·西彭加射门被封堵。 诺亚·萨迪基参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Nico O'Reilly.

events.description: 刚果民主共和国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Nathanaël Mbuku (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Brian Cipenga.

events.description: 纳撒内尔·姆布库射门被封堵。 布赖恩·西彭加参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Elliot Anderson.

events.description: 刚果民主共和国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Congo DR. Meschack Elia replaces Nathanaël Mbuku.

events.description: 梅沙克·埃利亚替补登场，换下纳撒内尔·姆布库。

qualifiers.espnText: Nico O'Reilly (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Ezri Konsa (England).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Djed Spence.

events.description: 埃贝雷奇·埃兹替补登场，换下杰德·斯彭斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Aaron Wan-Bissaka.
Eberechi Eze (England) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Goal! England 1, Congo DR 1. Harry Kane (England) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Anthony Gordon with a cross.
Substitution, Congo DR. Théo Bongonda replaces Brian Cipenga.

events.description: 西奥·邦贡达替补登场，换下布赖恩·西彭加。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Congo DR. Edo Kayembe replaces Ngal'ayel Mukau.

events.description: 埃多·卡耶姆贝替补登场，换下恩加拉耶尔·穆考。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Elliot Anderson (England) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Harry Kane.

events.description: 艾略特·安德森射门偏出。 凯恩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ezri Konsa (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Anthony Gordon (England) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Elliot Anderson with a cross.

events.description: 安东尼·哥顿射门偏出。 艾略特·安德森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Meschack Elia (Congo DR) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Jordan Pickford (England).

Attempt saved. Jude Bellingham (England) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is saved in the bottom left corner by Lionel Mpasi (Congo DR). Assisted by Elliot Anderson with a through ball.

events.description: 贝林厄姆射正。 艾略特·安德森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! England 2, Congo DR 1. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Anthony Gordon.
Substitution, Congo DR. Joris Kayembe replaces Arthur Masuaku.

events.description: 乔里斯·卡延贝替补登场，换下亚瑟·马苏库。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Congo DR. Fiston Mayele replaces Samuel Moutoussamy.

events.description: 菲斯顿·马耶勒替补登场，换下塞缪尔·穆图萨米。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Elliot Anderson.

events.description: 凯恩射门偏出。 艾略特·安德森参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Anthony Gordon (England).
Substitution, England. John Stones replaces Declan Rice.

events.description: 约翰·斯通斯替补登场，换下德克兰·赖斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Marc Guéhi (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Harry Kane (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 阿克塞尔·图安泽贝犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jude Bellingham (England).
Attempt missed. Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high from a direct free kick.
Second Half ends, England 2, Congo DR 1.

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

h2h.reason: 暂未找到两队的历史交锋记录

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

dongqiudiSource.emptyReason: 懂球帝全量球队赛历未列出此前直接交锋

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
